<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a clear picture. The truncation shown in the UI ("(已截断)") is purely for display purposes in the UI. Looking at the code:

1. In `panel.js`, the `formatOutput` function truncates text to 500 characters for display in the tool card UI - this is ONLY a display truncation, it does NOT affect what's sent to the model.

2. The actual tool results are stored in full and sent to the model via `results.push({ type: 'tool_result', tool_use_id: block.id, content: output })` in `agent-loop.js`. There's no truncation here.


3. There's also a 200-character slice in `agent-loop.js` at line 290, but that's just for debug logging of assistant messages, not the actual content going to the model.

Let me check `tools.js` to see if any truncation happens there.</details></think>

---

现在已经有了完整的答案。结论很清楚：

---

**"(已截断)" 仅是 UI 显示的截断，不影响发送给模型的实际数据。**

具体来说，`panel.js` 里的 `formatOutput()` 函数专门负责渲染工具卡片的界面显示，它将超过 **500 字符** 的输出截断，只是为了避免 UI 界面过于冗长：

```3480:3506:extension/sidepanel/panel.js
  formatOutput(output) {
    if (!output) {
      return '<span class="tool-card-empty">(无输出)</span>';
    }

    // 截断长文本
    const maxLen = 500;
    let displayText = output;
    let truncated = false;

    if (output.length > maxLen) {
      displayText = output.substring(0, maxLen);
      truncated = true;
    }

    // 转义HTML
    const escaped = this.escapeHtml(displayText);
    
    // 保留换行
    const formatted = escaped.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');

    if (truncated) {
      return `<span class="tool-card-text">${formatted}</span><span class="tool-card-truncated">(已截断)</span>`;
    }

    return `<span class="tool-card-text">${formatted}</span>`;
  }
```

而实际发送给模型的工具结果，在 `agent-loop.js` 里是完整存入的，没有任何截断：

```997:998:extension/sidepanel/agent-loop.js
          const output = await executeTool(block.name, block.input);
          results.push({ type: 'tool_result', tool_use_id: block.id, content: output });
```

**所以：模型看到的是完整的工具输出，UI 显示的 "(已截断)" 只是界面层面的展示优化，不用担心信息丢失。**
